---
title: "Mary Josephine Yonge Harris"
---

## Mary Josephine Yonge Harris

**Dates:** (b.1871)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. George Collyer Harris, biographer of Frances Mary Peard

### Letters

- [To Lady Leconfield, May 23d 1899](../letters/3406_To_Lady_Leconfield.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
